short_description: An automated irrigation and soil monitoring system powered by ESP32 and cellular IoT.
full_description: A complete hardware-software prototype designed to monitor soil moisture, ambient temperature, and humidity, and automate water pump controls. Features Web Dashboard integration for real-time tracking, SMS notifications, and battery-powered low-power optimization. Ideal for smart greenhouse farming in Nepal.
name: IoT Smart Agriculture System
description: A complete hardware-software prototype designed to monitor soil moisture, ambient temperature, and humidity, and automate water pump controls. Features Web Dashboard integration for real-time tracking, SMS notifications, and battery-powered low-power optimization. Ideal for smart greenhouse farming in Nepal.

short_description: A heavy-duty differential drive robot chassis designed for automated guided vehicle (AGV) applications.
full_description: A high-performance robotic platform using dual-channel BTS7960 motor drivers, high-torque encoder motors, and a TCRT5000 line-tracking array. Suitable for warehouse logistics research, line-following challenges, and autonomous navigation development with ROS. Features CNC-milled aluminum brackets and 3D printed sensor mounts.
name: Automated Warehouse AGV Chassis
description: A high-performance robotic platform using dual-channel BTS7960 motor drivers, high-torque encoder motors, and a TCRT5000 line-tracking array. Suitable for warehouse logistics research, line-following challenges, and autonomous navigation development with ROS. Features CNC-milled aluminum brackets and 3D printed sensor mounts.

short_description: A robotic arm with computer vision to sort objects based on color, shape, or size.
full_description: An advanced automated sorting system utilizing an OpenCV-enabled camera stream and a 4-DOF servo arm. The AI model runs edge inference on a Raspberry Pi 4 to identify objects, classify them in real-time, and coordinate arm movements to deposit them in target bins. Ideal for industrial assembly lines and academic research.
name: AI-Powered Object Sorting Robotic Arm
description: An advanced automated sorting system utilizing an OpenCV-enabled camera stream and a 4-DOF servo arm. The AI model runs edge inference on a Raspberry Pi 4 to identify objects, classify them in real-time, and coordinate arm movements to deposit them in target bins. Ideal for industrial assembly lines and academic research.

short_description: A low-power weather station with real-time cloud data logging and emergency warnings.
full_description: A solar-powered weather station that monitors rainfall, wind speed, wind direction, temperature, barometric pressure, and altitude. Uses ESP32 to publish data via MQTT to a central dashboard. Includes threshold alerts that send push notifications and emails when potential storm or flood patterns are detected.
name: Smart Weather Station & Alert System
description: A solar-powered weather station that monitors rainfall, wind speed, wind direction, temperature, barometric pressure, and altitude. Uses ESP32 to publish data via MQTT to a central dashboard. Includes threshold alerts that send push notifications and emails when potential storm or flood patterns are detected.
